title: mentha × pseudowirtgeniana
intro: Mentha × pseudowirtgeniana, also known as Peppermint or Broad-leaved Mint, is a hybrid mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to relieve digestive issues and reduce nausea due to its high concentration of menthol and menthone. The health benefits of Mentha × pseudowirtgeniana include its ability to alleviate headaches, improve respiratory health, and reduce inflammation. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
